name: Code Analyzer (Gemini)
description: Analyzes code for time/space complexity and quality using Gemini API.

privacy_practices.single_purpose: This extension analyzes code snippets for time/space complexity and provides quality insights using the Gemini API.

permissions.activeTab: Required to analyze the currently open code in the browser tab.
permissions.scripting: Needed to inject scripts into pages for analyzing code snippets selected by the user.
permissions.storage: Used to save user preferences and API keys securely within the extension.
permissions.contextMenus: Allows adding a right-click menu option for quick code analysis.

privacy_practices.remote_code: Remote Gemini API is used to analyze code and generate complexity/quality feedback.
